series_metadata.series_title: Outside Counsel Proposals to Attorney General
series_metadata.series_description: Outside Counsel firms proposed cases to the Ohio Attorney General''s Office (AGO). Records include, but are not limited to, correspondence, spreadsheet data from pension funds, and memos from law firms assessing strengths of the potential cases.
